text.title: Benefits Realization Worked Example
text.summary: One worked example showing Benefits Realization applied end-to-end on a representative engagement.

example.title: Reference engagement
example.code: Engagement: acme-crm-2026 Benefit b1: metric: deals_closed_per_q baseline_value: 120 (source: salesforce report 2026-01-01) target_value: 144 (+20%) owner: VP Sales (NOT the PM) attribution_plan: diff-in-diff using EMEA region as control category: revenue Checkpoints: 2026-04-01, 2026-07-01, 2026-10-01, 2027-01-01. At 6-month checkpoint: actual=132 (+10%); realization = 60%. Counterfactual: EMEA grew 5% organically -> attributed lift 5% -> realization 25%. PM action: flag to sponsor; schedule adoption-acceleration sub-project.
example.note: Illustrates every rule from content/01-core-rules.xml on a realistic case.
